---
title: Text analysis
description: An introduction to natural language processing using &nbsp;[![](img/logo_textblob.png){width="2.3em"}](https://textblob.readthedocs.io/en/stable/)
title-block-banner: true
---

:::{.topdef}

This course is a gentle introduction to rule-based text analysis for the humanities and social sciences using the Python library [TextBlob](https://textblob.readthedocs.io/en/stable/).

It only requires a very basic knowledge of Python.

:::

<br>
[[Start course ➤](nlp_install.qmd)]{.topinline}

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "LearningResource",
  "name": "An introduction to natural language processing using TextBlob",
  "description": "This course is a gentle introduction to rule-based text analysis for the humanities and social sciences using the Python library TextBlob. \nIt only requires a very basic knowledge of Python.",
  "url": "https://mint.westdri.ca/python/top_nlp",
  "learningResourceType": "course",
  "inLanguage": "en",
  "license": "https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/",
  "provider": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "SFU Research Computing Group",
  },
  "keywords": "Python, intro, NLP, TextBlob",
  "author": {
    "@type": "Person",
    "name": "Marie-Hélène Burle"
  }
}
</script>
